profile.hero_bio: Developing embedded system architectures, low-cost IoT hardware modifications, and automated agentic AI workflows.

items.title: 01 // Hardware
items.description: ESP32 microprocessors, sensor array calibration, physical automated relays, and asynchronous packet transfer protocols.

items.title: 02 // Automation
items.description: Autonomous multi-step orchestration workflows configured across Make.com engines paired with structural language parsing frames.

items.title: 03 // Verification
items.description: Precision electronic blueprinting and functional validation using Cadence Virtuoso, terminal environments, and LTspice simulation maps.

sections.heading: Selected Deployments
sections.subheading: Engineering solutions, functional prototypes, and software platforms.

items.title: Safety-Enhanced Stitching Machine Ecosystem (Project SafeStitch)
items.description: Engineered a custom hardware safety modification framework utilizing high-speed infrared optical sensor arrays mapped to low-latency microcontroller processing loops to prevent industrial needle injuries.

items.title: Asynchronous IoT Threat Interceptor
items.description: Assembled a physical secure tracking asset executing low-latency asynchronous server architectures on microprocessors to deploy localized relay warnings.

items.title: Autonomous Agentic Automations
items.description: Engineered production automated routines integrating multi-app logic modules to handle multi-step semantic actions without manual processing overhead.
